reviews.review_msg: One of the best profs--truly cares about your learning. Never having taken an ENGL course, she was extremely helpful and forthcoming. When asking for guidance, she provides extensive advice to help improve grades. Class had biweekly reading journals and 2 essays. Marking was fair though on the lower side.

Carolyn would greatly benefit from advocating and caring about the well-being of her students in her classes and the English department. I strongly recommend avoiding enrollment in any of her classes.

I finish my degree this year and looking back I can say that Lesjak was the most boring waste of time. Lectures were her opinions about the readings. She could be very unprofessional. She started class one day complaining about her teenage daughter, called her "a flake" and said "teenagers are the Devil" (I was a teenager when I took the class).

I took this class as an elective, having only taken 1 other post-secondary English course (ENGL 111W), I was a bit concerned, but Carolyn was very helpful and gave great feedback. Lectures were async, which was nice. Overall an enjoyable class. Thanks Carolyn.

Carolyn is AMAZING. Such a nice lady. 3 papers, 1 final. 5 books to read + lots of online readings and a couple films (a lot of work). She made everything so much more interesting than it seemed. TA's grade a little tough on the papers

Lesjak loves the subject matter. I loved the intertwining of critical race tenets, patriarchal relations and gendered discourse that her selection of literature entailed. However, I found her lectures dragged on, and that I learned very little, perhaps due to my lack of interest in English. Yet she was very cheerful, and I can see her appeal.

Carolyn is a super nice lady and extremely knowledgeable - but this course is way too difficult for a lower division course. Assignments were unclear and very open to interpretation - with marking that doesnt fully explain what you are doing incorrect. However, she is always available for help when asked. Make sure to participate in all lectures.

Carolyn is really nice and approachable. Very knowledgeable but not at all arrogant. She got to know everyone well. The 3-hour seminar went by much faster than all of my other 2-hour lectures... class was always interesting and thought-provoking. The reading material seemed difficult at first but with time became easier. Would definitely recommend!

Carolyn is a truly amazing professor. She cares immensely about her students and is truly passionate about what she teaches. She makes lectures interesting, is personable and often hilarious as well. She gives incredible feedback on assignments and is always willing to help you improve. I would highly recommend her if you're willing to work hard.

She is one of the friendliest profs I have met. Shes filled with passion. Only negative thing from her lectures would be that she points out way too many things; it can be hard to figure out what points are important for the exam. However, she gives really good assistance and cares for her students. Better have her as a TA also ;)
